name: FIFA
why_target: Parent body; one-in-a-million long-shot but worth a single comms-team email for legitimacy
notes: form-only; HQ Zurich; do not expect a reply but the request is logged

name: UEFA
why_target: European confederation; if even one comms officer forwards us to UEFA Together we reach all 55 MAs at once
notes: Public media inbox is genuinely monitored

name: CONMEBOL
why_target: South American confederation; press-relations team is small and accessible

name: CONCACAF
why_target: Caribbean+Central+North America; runs Gold Cup so understands tournament-promo asks

name: CAF
why_target: African confederation; Cairo HQ; published media inbox

why_target: Asian confederation incl. Australia; Kuala Lumpur HQ; large media-services unit

name: OFC
why_target: Oceania confederation; Auckland HQ - shares postcode with NZ Football

name: The Football Association
why_target: WC26 qualifier; reaches all 50 county FAs via internal comms
